summary: Accessibility and polish pass testing for TaxNext.in static React site. All 20 specified checks passed — FAQ animations, breadcrumb ARIA attributes, filter button tap targets, footer social link sizes, footer text contrast color, header mobile menu aria-expanded toggle, close button aria-label, and focus-visible:ring-2 on CTA/mobile buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All accessibility/polish changes verified: FAQ smooth animation (max-height+opacity CSS transition), breadcrumbs on all 8 pages have aria-label='Breadcrumb' and aria-current='page', filter buttons >=32px, footer social links 40x40px, footer text uses #7a8c82, hamburger aria-expanded toggles, close btn has aria-label, MobileBottomCTA Call Us/WhatsApp buttons have focus-visible:ring-2.

test_results.faq_home_animation: PASS - transition-[max-height,opacity] duration-200, max-h-96 opacity-100 when open
test_results.footer_text_color: PASS - text-[#7a8c82] confirmed on copyright text
test_results.cta_focus_visible: PASS - focus-visible:ring-2 present on all CTA elements
test_results.mobile_bottom_cta_focus_visible: PASS - Call Us and WhatsApp buttons have focus-visible:ring-2
